## Checklist

- [ ] One concern per PR (if this bundles unrelated work, please split)
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or: justification provided in the description above)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (if user-visible change)
- [ ] `TODO.md` updated (if completing a tracked item)
